name: Cracking the Coding Interview
description: Gayle Laakmann McDowell's comprehensive guide with 189 programming interview questions and detailed solutions.

reviews.title: The gold standard for coding interviews
reviews.reviewText: This book has everything you need to prepare for FAANG-level coding interviews. The explanations are thorough and the breadth of problems covered is impressive. I used it for three months before landing my current job.

reviews.title: Essential interview prep resource
reviews.reviewText: Systematically covers data structures, algorithms, system design, and behavioural questions. The big-O complexity explanations alone are worth the price. A must-own for anyone in software.

reviews.title: Comprehensive but very dense
reviews.reviewText: Incredible depth of content. Some solutions could be explained more clearly but the sheer number of quality problems makes it indispensable for interview prep. Takes time but pays off.
